introSection: Pterosaur Flying (Chinese: 翼龙飞翔) is a suspended steel roller coaster built by Chinese firm Jinma Rides currently located at Zhoukou Dinosaur Park (also referred to as Dinosaur Happy World) in Huaiyang District, Zhoukou City, Henan Province.
fullText: Pterosaur Flying (Chinese: 翼龙飞翔) is a suspended steel roller coaster built by Chinese firm Jinma Rides currently located at Zhoukou Dinosaur Park (also referred to as Dinosaur Happy World) in Huaiyang District, Zhoukou City, Henan Province.
